description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsBlack shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perforationsFoamy globalite midsoleTPU outsole with arched midfoot and patterned lugsThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
